# Smart Bharat AI

> AI-powered civic companion for India. Access government schemes, generate professional complaints, understand documents, and get 24/7 multilingual guidance powered by Google Gemini.

Smart Bharat AI helps Indian citizens navigate government services through a virtual government officer available in 9 Indian languages. Every AI response is structured (Summary, Steps, Documents, Warnings, Tips, Useful Links) and ends with a Next Best Action.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and how it works.
- [AI Civic Companion](/assistant): Officer-style chat assistant with voice input and 9 Indian languages.
- [Scheme Recommender](/schemes): Personalized central and state scheme recommendations.
- [Complaint Generator](/complaints): Turn plain descriptions into CPGRAMS-ready complaints.
- [Document Assistant](/documents): Guides for Aadhaar, PAN, Passport, DL, Voter ID and more.
- [My Space](/my-space): Local, private dashboard for saved items.

## Optional

- Roadmap: interactive civic issue map, Impact Score analytics, WhatsApp bot, state-specific deep-links.
